text:
Once upon a time in the serene village of Oakwood, a little owl named Osprey lived in a nest perched high in a venerable oak tree. Osprey loved listening to the songs of the evening songbirds. One particular night, a gentle snowfall enveloped the village. Osprey listened as the world lay asleep around him.

Suddenly, he heard a soft voice.

"Oh owl, lost in dreams. Would you like some berries?"

It was a squirrel, nibbling onberries near the old orchard. Osprey swooped down, eager to share. They ate together, feeling a peace that seemed almost magical.

As morning light streamed through the oak leaves, Osprey took flight, eager to continue their friendship. He flew higher than ever before, just enjoying the beauty. That day, he passed a glacial lake glittering under the sunrise.
